headline: June 14 federal votes: SVP No-10-Million-Switzerland initiative and Civil Service Act amendment
summary: Switzerland votes Sunday 14 June on the SVP population-cap initiative and a civil-service law tightening.

headline: G7 summit opens at Evian; Geneva-region farmers protest Lake Geneva border closures
summary: Border-post closures for the 2026 G7 summit at Evian threaten Geneva-region farm work and harvests.

headline: Vaud tech park Y-Parc resumes expansion; Yverdon weighs hospital relocation onto the site
summary: Yverdon-les-Bains debates moving its hospital into the Y-Parc technology park as the park grows again.

headline: Financing of the 13th AHV pension still unresolved before parliamentary showdown
summary: A conciliation conference failed to settle how Switzerland will fund the 13th AHV old-age pension payment.

headline: Swiss IV ruling criticized: disabled municipal president denied disability pension
summary: Switzerland's IV disability insurance denied a pension to a serving municipal president with a disability, drawing criticism.

headline: US-Iran peace deal reported imminent on war day 106; Iran sets July funeral for Khamenei and lifts 88-day internet blackout
summary: Pakistan says a final US-Iran deal text exists covering an all-fronts ceasefire and Hormuz reopening; Iran schedules Khamenei's July funeral and ends its internet shutdown.

headline: Gaza post-ceasefire death toll reaches 983 after Israeli strike on refugee camp
summary: Al Jazeera reports 983 Palestinians killed since the Gaza ceasefire after a new Israeli attack on a refugee camp; Israel also strikes Lebanon.

headline: Zelensky to meet Trump at Evian G7 to push a Putin summit and keep US backing
summary: Ukraine's president will use the G7 at Evian to pitch Trump on a Putin meeting and lock in continued US support.

headline: Indian Air Force transport plane crashes in Assam, five killed
summary: A military transport aircraft crashed in India's Assam state, killing five Indian Air Force personnel.

headline: Violence erupts at anti-government protest in DR Congo
summary: Clashes broke out at a demonstration against the government in the Democratic Republic of the Congo.

headline: Trump's name removed from Kennedy Center after court ruling
summary: Crews began stripping Trump's name from Washington's Kennedy Center following a court decision against the renaming.

headline: CVE-2026-11624: Model Context Protocol DNS-rebinding flaw, CVSS 9.4
summary: MCP servers before v0.25.0 could not validate the Origin/host header, enabling DNS-rebinding attacks against local MCP servers; --allowed-hosts flag added in v0.25.0.

headline: CISA KEV adds Oracle PeopleSoft PeopleTools missing-auth CVE-2026-35273, ransomware-linked
summary: CISA added Oracle PeopleSoft Enterprise PeopleTools missing-authentication CVE-2026-35273 to KEV with known ransomware use; federal deadline 15 June.

headline: ABRT/libreport local privilege-escalation chain CVE-2026-54228/54229/54230
summary: Red Hat's ABRT crash reporter and libreport have a TOCTOU race, ownership race and symlink-follow chain enabling local user to root file overwrite.

headline: Grafana Operator path-traversal/token-theft CVE-2026-11769 patched in 5.24.0
summary: Grafana Operator <=5.23 lets a user creating Dashboard resources steal the operator's Kubernetes service-account token via jsonnet.

headline: Allegra exportReport directory traversal CVE-2026-11442 and XSS auth-bypass CVE-2026-11443
summary: ZDI disclosed authenticated directory-traversal info disclosure and stored-XSS auth bypass in the Allegra project-management server, fixed in 9.0.0.
